description: G.41 — Eval harness thresholds. quality-gate fails when any tier falls below its required_pass_rate.

offline.description: Deterministic cases with no LLM calls. Must be 100% green before every release.

live.description: Optional LLM-judged cases (requires OPENAI_API_KEY + VIPER_EVAL_USE_LLM=1). Not enforced by default quality-gate.
